what: Warm smoke-test of the ring-wedge fix (branch fix/ring-wedge-receipt-truth): coordinator churn must not wedge the warm ring — no re-warm between coordinator processes
ring: 6x RTX5090 scattered EU (HU,HU,DK,CZ,BG,CZ), one stage per /24 subnet + machine, libp2p sidecars, layers [0:10][10:20][20:30][30:40][40:51][51:62]
code: eagle/tree-verify-v2 @ a7742f0 (contains the wedge fix commits 46c93bd + 3a5241d verbatim; tree handlers dormant without M25_TREE)

procedure_and_results.desc: first coordinator on the fresh warm ring
coordinator kill -9 at t=14s, mid-decode, depth=4 chunks in flight
NEW coordinator process on the SAME ring, NO re-warm (the old code wedged exactly here — tail closed pred on ret death, EOF cascaded, nobody re-dialed)
coordinator with SHARD_RECEIPTS=1 (stages not signing this launch — coverage logic is CPU-test-pinned in tests/test_receipt_coverage.py)
procedure_and_results.result: PASS — 38 tok, 7.18 tok/s, no crash on empty receipt sweep

stage_log_evidence: every head/middle stage logged 'edge closed (ConnectionError); reset + drop forward link' -> 'forward link rebuilt -> 127.0.0.1:29611' per churn; tail logged 'predecessor edge closed; re-accepting both channels' — the ported specpipe choreography executing as designed, weights never reloaded
verdict: WEDGE FIXED: the re-warm-before-every-coordinator tax is gone; a warm ring survives coordinator kill/restart mid-job (stale in-flight replies dropped until the next reset)
caveats: clean-exit churn also cascades a ring re-handshake by design (~1s, no weight reload); receipts-signing arm not exercised on-ring this run
